data.content:
Implemented and pushed the finished execution-plan API documentation pass.

Branch: worktree-foolery-d2ea-execution-plan-docs
Commit: 728cb837760c685efc955acb63ac22b064d8451d

Changes
- Rewrote the Execution Plans section in docs/API.md into a consumer-facing guide with a clear mental model, execution semantics, error matrix, and end-to-end workflow example.
- Enriched the OpenAPI path metadata for /api/plans and /api/plans/{planId} with descriptions, examples, and missing response coverage.
- Added behavioral descriptions to execution-plan schemas so generated docs better explain plan structure versus live progress.

Verification
- bun install --frozen-lockfile
- bun run lint src/lib/openapi/paths-plans.ts src/lib/openapi/schemas-plans.ts
- bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/plans-route.test.ts
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run build
- bun run lint
- bun run test

Status
- Branch is pushed and clean. Ready for implementation review and shipment.
